current_run.description: This problem involves finding a secret pair of indices (i, j) such that a target quadratic function based on these indices, involving pairwise XORs of input bits, evaluates to 1 for a specific input. Specifically, f(x) = ((x_i XOR x_j) AND (x_i OR x_j)) XOR (x_i AND x_j) for a secret pair (i, j) and a random input x, where the function is constructed to be non-linear and dependent on the relationships between specific bits.
